ddt:Target.Name: N_P32M_ECM_M1D(SpecB)_Mar2009_by_PCT
ddt:Target.Description:
New update for adding DTC 12Bh Mar 2009 RSM PCT
Calculateur de Controle Moteur Diesel Common Rail Bosch EDC16CP33
Version Soft : WD2a - (Diag On CAN) Septembre 2006 Moteur M9Rk 800 / 802 / 803 et M9Ra 742 X91
MARCHAIS Florent CTL L49 1 64 Tel : 70 577 florent.marchais@renault.com
2007/10/23 Nissan XX4 H.Nakahara / T.Matsuoka Rename the file for N_P32M_ECM_M1D(SpecB)_200710XX.xml. Modify Requests, Devices and Data. takenori-matsuoka@mail.nissan.co.jp
-------------------- Hand Over ----------------------
1. May 19th, 2008 : Add UEGO and AT related DTCs, Translate DTC description in English
---------------Modified DTC Faulty type----------------
1. 24th Nov, 2008

circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
Crankshaft Sensor / Camshaft Sensor Correlation Failure
Turbo Solenoid Valve Command Circuit Failure
Intake Air Temperature Sensor Circuit Failure
Throttle Valve Position Sensor Circuit Failure
UEGO Sensor Circuit No Activity Detected
Track 1 of Accelerator Pedal Sensor Failure
Speed Threshold Overshoot Failure during After Sales Regeneration
EGR Valve Position Sensor Circuit Failure
CCSL Steering Wheel Button Input Failure
CCSL Vehicle Speed / Displayed Speed Incoherency
Engine Control Unit Failure, Piezoelectric Stage
CCSL Failure due to Failure of Other Systems
UEGO Sensor O2 Calibration Level Error or SPI Chip Fault
AT Engine Torque without Gearbox Req
Particulate Filter Upstream Temperature Sensor Failure
Track 2 of Accelerator Pedal Sensor in Failure
Acceleration / Brake Pedals Plausibility Error and Loss of 2 Circuits Error
EGR Cooling Bypass Solenoid Valve Failure
Particulate Filter Downstream Temperature Sensor Failure

Item.Text: 0x09 : illegal change of locked bits in PLL configuration registers
0x19 : a branch to a an unimplemented exception vector has occured
0x21 : unplausible case of ASDdc parameter set selection
0x23 : unplausible case of ASDrf parameter set selection
0x24 : Bypass: stopped by ASCETSD or timeout
0x25 : an error in CoEng_ShOff state machine has occured
0x26 : Default state of engine state machine reached
0x27 : default case of glow control state machine
0x28 : Recovery with full test extent which is triggerd after 3 other recoveries
0x29 : Unplausible number of cylinders in EngM_numCyl
0x2B : after amplifier trimming of CY370 an error ampl_err'isdetected'
0x2D : error in CY370 clock monitoring done by HWE
0x2F : error in CY370 RAM test done by HWE
0x36 : unplausible case of switch stExch in function NVC_InitEEPROMData
0x37 : default state of injector quantity adjustment
0x3A : unplausible case of switch NUM_BITS*numPath + numBit
0x3C : unplausible case of LIGov parameter set selection
0x3D : default state of setpoint calculation of metering unit has occured
0x3E : Cyclic RAM check of memory monitoring failed
0x3F : Cyclic ROM check of memory monitoring failed
0x43 : MON: TPU Code emulation RAM cecksum failure detected
0x45 : unplausible case of CAN baudrate and electrical architecture
0x4C : Operating system: time table already active
0x4D : Operating system: argument out of range
0x4E : Plausibility error in engine speed check
0x4F : Energising time exceeds limit of overrun monitoring

0x51 : default case of set point tracking
0x52 : default state of rail pressure sensor offset state has occured

0x55 : default state of ramping during start was reached
0x56 : default state of engine coordinator was reached
0x57 : default state of starting cut out monitoring was reached
0x58 : Default state of turbocharger cooling pump machine was reached
